data.ocrPrompt: Extract ALL readable text from this image. Return ONLY the raw text content, exactly as it appears. Do not add commentary, analysis, or formatting. If there is no text in the image, return "NO_TEXT_FOUND". Preserve the original language (Filipino, English, Taglish, etc.)
data.rawExtractedText:
Bongbong Marcos
19h
Sa oras ng panganib, hindi dapat madagdagan ang hirap ng ating mga kababayan.
Kaya ipinag-utos ko ang agarang pagkilos ng mga ahensya ng pamahalaan upang tumugon sa
ashfall mula sa Mayon Volcano eruption.
Nililinis ang mga kalsada, namamahagi ng N95 masks, at naglalagay ng water stations, mobile
clinics, at tulong para sa mga lumikas upang maprotektahan ang ating mga komunidad.
Patuloy nating binabantayan ang sitwasyon, kabilang ang panganib ng lahar.
...
Alam nating may epekto ito sa kalusugan at kabuhayan ng ating mga kababayan, kaya't tuloy-
tuloy ang tulong ng pamahalaan hanggang makabalik sa normal ang pang-araw-araw na buhay ng
bawat pamilyang apektado.
COURTESY
DOST-PHIVOLCS
May 2, 2026
DOST-PHIV RTVM
PHILIPPINE INSTITUTE OF
VOLCANOLOGY AND SEISMOLOGY
OneDOST4U: Solutions and Opportunities for All
PRESIDENTIAL BROADCAST
Mayo:02 Valcano 2026-05-02 05:41 PM

data.rawResponse:
```json
{
  "label": "TRUE",
  "confidence": 95,
  "explanation": "Sis, mukhang legit naman 'to! According to reliable sources like The Guardian, Al Jazeera, and Bloomberg, Mayon Volcano really erupted on May 2, 2026. May pa-ashfall, evacuations, and government response pa nga. So, believable naman ang claims ni BBM, mhie!",
  "claims": [
    "Government agencies are responding to the ashfall from the Mayon Volcano eruption.",
    "Roads are being cleaned, N95 masks are being distributed, and water stations and mobile clinics are being set up.",
    "Assistance is being provided to evacuees.",
    "The situation, including the risk of lahar, is being continuously monitored.",
    "Government aid will continue until daily life returns to normal for affected families."
  ],
  "evidence": [
    "https://www.theguardian.com/world/video/2026/may/04/volcano-erupts-philippines-ash-evacuations-video",
    "https://www.aljazeera.com/video/newsfeed/2026/5/2/philippines-volcano-erupts-blanketing-ash-across-the-sky",
    "https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-05-03/philippines-says-thousands-evacuated-as-mayon-volcano-erupts",
    "https://www.manilatimes.net/2026/05/02/videos/mayon-volcano-erupts-spreads-ash-to-nearby-areas/2334252"
  ],
  "linguistic_flags": [],
  "fact_correction": null
}
```

data.label: True
claims: Government agencies are responding to the ashfall from the Mayon Volcano eruption.
Roads are being cleaned, N95 masks are being distributed, and water stations and mobile clinics are being set up.
Assistance is being provided to evacuees.
The situation, including the risk of lahar, is being continuously monitored.
Government aid will continue until daily life returns to normal for affected families.

data.summary: Mhie, itong statement ni Bongbong Marcos checks out kasi supported ng reliable sources yung mga actions ng government during the Mayon Volcano eruption.
data.tip: Always look for multiple credible news sources when verifying government actions during emergencies to avoid falling for misinformation, okay?

literacyLesson.summary: Mhie, itong statement ni Bongbong Marcos checks out kasi supported ng reliable sources yung mga actions ng government during the Mayon Volcano eruption.

points.issue: Sis, he mentioned specific actions like cleaning roads, distributing masks, and setting up water stations.
points.correction: These actions are confirmed by news reports from credible sources like The Manila Times and Al Jazeera, so it's not just kuda.

points.issue: The statement mentions ashfall from the Mayon Volcano eruption.
points.correction: Grabe, this is also backed up by international news outlets like Bloomberg and The Guardian, solidifying the event's reality.

points.issue: He also said na binabantayan ang sitwasyon, kasama na ang panganib ng lahar.
points.correction: This shows awareness and monitoring, which is what you'd expect from a government response to a natural disaster, teh.

literacyLesson.tip: Always look for multiple credible news sources when verifying government actions during emergencies to avoid falling for misinformation, okay?
